creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You have probably already tried reinstalling the libtool port, but if you 
haven't please do.  Satoshi's build on -stable are ok and I'm able to build 
this on a -current Alpha and i386 box.  I'm afriad without some patches to 
make this work on 2.2.8, I'm probably going to just close this PR.
